titleStmt.title: SII 10.466: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 466. (A.R. No. 173 of 1905.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE. Ňö. 1213. (Khara)

summary.p: Incomplete. Mentions Ambadńďva-MahńĀrńĀja and his subordinate Khadńďva (?)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

rjunasaptńĀŠĻĀgasaŠĻĀharaŠĻáa kńĀŠĻ≠avarńĀyavidhvaŠĻĀsana pńĀ

sa gaŠĻĀŠłćapeŠĻĀŠłćńĀra Ňõrńęmatu AŠĻĀbadńďvamahńĀrńĀ

sahitu laina Ňõrńęmatu Ňõrńętripu
